candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A student prepares three buffer solutions. Each solution is 1.0 M in one of the acids in the table and 1.0 M in its corresponding sodium salt. Which of the solutions has the greatest buffer capacity with respect to added NaOH and why?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
根据下表中酸的信息回答问题:

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
酸 & $\mathrm{p}K_\mathrm{a}$ & 酸强度 \\
\hline
甲酸 & 3.75 & 弱酸 \\
\hline
氯乙酸 & 2.86 & 强酸 \\
\hline
苯甲酸 & 4.20 & 弱酸 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

学生准备三种缓冲溶液,每种溶液中该酸的浓度为 1.0 M,相应钠盐的浓度也为 1.0 M。对于添加的 NaOH,哪种缓冲溶液具有最大的缓冲能力?

A. 苯甲酸缓冲液是最强的酸
B. 氯乙酸缓冲液,因为它是最强的酸
C. 甲酸缓冲液,因为它捐赠了两个氢离子
D. 三种缓冲溶液的缓冲能力相同
metadata.explanation_zh: 缓冲溶液的缓冲能力不仅取决于溶质的物质的量,还取决于弱酸的离解常数(Ka)和溶液的pH值。当pH等于弱酸的pKa(Ka的负对数)时,缓冲能力达到最大。即使三种溶液中溶质的物质的量相同,但如果它们含有不同的弱酸(Ka值不同)或者pH值与各自的pKa值不同,它们的缓冲能力也会有所不同。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question is clear and the expected answer target ('all are the same') is understandable. Although the prompt references a table, the actual image content is not essential for the core reasoning because all buffers are described as 1.0 M acid and 1.0 M conjugate salt; the image is also legible if consulted.
